GetResourceOauth2token.x-bce-workload-access-token: WAT (passed via Header; mutually exclusive with workloadAccessToken in Body)
GetResourceOauth2token.resourceCredentialProviderName: Name of the credential provider (required on first call)
GetResourceOauth2token.scopes: List of OAuth2 scopes; defaults to provider's default if not specified
GetResourceOauth2token.oauth2Flow: OAuth2 flow type; defaults to USER_FEDERATION (3LO)
GetResourceOauth2token.resourceOauth2ReturnUrl: Client callback URL (required on first call); must be registered in the Agent allowlist
GetResourceOauth2token.sessionUri: Session URI returned from the initial request (required when polling)
GetResourceOauth2token.forceAuthentication: Defaults to false; when true, bypasses cache and forces re-authorization
GetResourceOauth2token.workloadAccessToken: WAT (passed via Body; can also be passed via Header)
